g.text: Usage: -c [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
Cross-referenced MITRE CAPEC/CWE/ATT&CK/ATLAS/D3FEND silo + scanner.
│ --install-completion Install completion for the current shell. │
│ --show-completion Show completion for the current shell, to copy │
│ it or customize the installation. │
│ --help Show this message and exit. │
│ update Re-download MITRE data, normalize, and rebuild the SQLite │
│ reference DB. │
│ search Full-text search across the silo. │
│ show Show one entity plus all its outbound and inbound xrefs. │
│ enrich Run enrichers and write distilled context into │
│ enrichment.db. │
│ research Web-research one entity via crawl4ai. Cached in │
│ enrichment.db. │
│ cve Show one CVE plus its CWE links and affected CPE list. │
│ survey Stage 1 — walk the project, run language harnesses, │
│ persist structural map to cohort.db. │
│ prematch Stage 2a — run Bandit + Semgrep, persist findings, seed │
│ investigations + hypotheses. │
│ prematch-secrets Stage 2b — run detect-secrets + TruffleHog + Gitleaks, │
│ persist findings + investigations. │
│ prematch-iac Stage 2c — run Trivy + Hadolint for IaC + container │
│ scanning. │
│ prematch-deps Stage 2d — run OSV-Scanner against lockfiles, auto-enrich │
│ with our CVE database. │
│ investigate Stage 3 — walk CWE→CAPEC→ATT&CK→D3FEND→UKC for every open │
│ hypothesis, score priority, persist evidence. │
│ verify Stage 4 — re-survey live code per hypothesis, classify │
│ confirmed/partial/rejected. │
│ report Stage 5 — emit Markdown + SARIF + STIX reports of │
│ confirmed/partial findings. │
│ triage Production-only exploit triage. Filters confirmed findings │
│ by file-path classification, re-runs TruffleHog with live │
│ verification, and emits a ranked report. │
│ scan Run the full scan pipeline: survey → prematch │
│ (code/secrets/iac/deps) → investigate → verify → report. │
│ graphql Run a GraphQL query in-process against the unified schema. │
│ tui Launch the Textual TUI: tree views + search + detail │
│ panel. │
│ dev Internal data tooling. │
